title: More Create Style Interfaces
description: More mod compatibility of Create Style Interfaces by ogabasferr
body:
# More Create Style Interfaces
This resource pack adds more mod supports for [Create Style Interfaces](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-style-interface).

All credit goes to [ogabasferr](https://modrinth.com/user/ogabasferr) for creating the original resource pack! I simply added more mod compatibility as the resource pack hasn't updated in a while.

Current Mods Supported:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

✅ Backpacked
✅ Better Archaeology
✅ Exposure (_partially_)
✅ Horseman
✅ Immersive Aircraft
✅ Sawmill

</details>
